title: AIO Page Builder — Render Surfaces Spec
description: Allowed surfaces where styling subsystem may emit CSS variables or rules. All selectors align with css-selector-contract.md; no new structural selectors.

render_surfaces.description: Global scope; token values apply site-wide unless overridden by a more specific surface.
Page wrapper per css-selector-contract.md §4; page-level token overrides.
Section wrapper aio-s-{section_key}; section-scoped overrides when supported.

rules: No injection of styles or markup into post_content or block inner HTML.
Emission only at the surfaces listed; no arbitrary selector targets.
Output limited to CSS custom properties (and optionally one plugin-owned stylesheet) per styling-subsystem-contract.
